zh.lifeSummary: 當William Andrews於1366年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，他的父親Ralph Andrews III50歲，母親Lady, Anne Swinborne44歲。他於大約1396年與Margaret Elizabeth Chislington在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1400年在他的家鄉享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Andrews于1366年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可时，他的父亲Ralph Andrews III50岁，母亲Lady, Anne Swinborne44岁。他于大约1396年与Margaret Elizabeth Chislington在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1400年在他的家乡享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Andrews was born in 1366, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Andrews III, was 50 and his mother, Lady, Anne Swinborne, was 44. He married Margaret Elizabeth Chislington about 1396, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1400, in his hometown, at the age of 34, and was buried in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Andrews est né en 1366, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Andrews III, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Lady, Anne Swinborne, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Elizabeth Chislington environ 1396, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1400, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Andrews 1366 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Andrews III 50 und seine Mutter Lady, Anne Swinborne 44. Er hat um 1396 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret Elizabeth Chislington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 34 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Andrews è nato il nel 1366 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph Andrews III, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Lady, Anne Swinborne, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Elizabeth Chislington circa 1396, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1400, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Andrewsが1366年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Ralph Andrews IIIは50歳，母Lady, Anne Swinborneは44歳であった。約1396年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでMargaret Elizabeth Chislingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1400年に故郷で34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Andrews(이)가 1366년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Andrews III(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady, Anne Swinborne(은)는 44세였다. 그는 대략 1396년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Margaret Elizabeth Chislington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1400년 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Andrews nasceu em 1366, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Andrews III, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Lady, Anne Swinborne, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Elizabeth Chislington aproximadamente 1396, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1400, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Andrews родился в 1366 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Andrews III было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady, Anne Swinborne, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Elizabeth Chislington около 1396 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1400 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Andrews nació en 1366, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Andrews III, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Lady, Anne Swinborne, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Margaret Elizabeth Chislington aproximadamente 1396, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1400, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
